evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); const b=document.querySelector('.cat-btn-new'); const vis=el=>{if(!el)return false;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();const s=getComputedStyle(el);return r.width>0&&r.height>0&&s.opacity!=='0'&&s.visibility!=='hidden';}; r.nuevoVisibleReposo=vis(b); r.rectReposo=b?JSON.stringify({w:Math.round(b.getBoundingClientRect().width),x:Math.round(b.getBoundingClientRect().x)}):null; const inp=document.getElementById('searchCatalogo'); if(inp){inp.focus();inp.value='ajon';inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,800)); r.nuevoVisibleBuscando=vis(b); r.rectBuscando=b?Math.round(b.getBoundingClientRect().width):null; return r; })()
